name: Raisin Crumb Pie
recipeInstructions:
This recipe makes enough filling for 2 pies.
Wash and clean the raisins. Add the cold water and 1 1/2 cups of sugar. Cook until the raisins are tender and plump. Set aside to cool.
Mix the flour, 1 1/2 cups of sugar, and shortening. Crumble well with your fingers.
Take out one cup of these crumbs and set aside.
To the remaining crumb mixture add the eggs and milk. Mix well. Stir in the baking powder.
Line two large pie pans with pastry. Fill with cooked raisins. Pour over this the batter and sprinkle the top with the reserved crumbs.
Bake at 440°F for 10 minutes. Reduce heat to 350°F and finish baking about 35 minutes.
